recommendations.title: Aftershock
recommendations.overview: Mayhem and death follow when an earthquake traps a group of tourists in a Chilean town.

recommendations.title: Magic Magic
recommendations.overview: In remote Chile, a vacationing young woman begins to mentally unravel; meanwhile, her friends ignore her claim until it's too late.

recommendations.title: Jigoku
recommendations.overview: A group of sinners involved in interconnected tales of murder, revenge, deceit and adultery all meet at the Gates of Hell.

recommendations.title: The Descent

recommendations.title: The Wolf Hour

recommendations.title: Dave Made a Maze

recommendations.title: The Monster Project
recommendations.overview: A group of aspiring filmmakers interview three individuals who claim to be monsters. However, unique incidents start to occur when they start filming.
